environmentChecks.description: The Python interpreter required by Harness tests is available.
The canonical unit test command is declared.
environmentChecks.remediation: Fix the command registry entry or the failing tests.

adapterFallbacks.description: Example metadata for a future check that cannot be expressed as a command or built-in probe.
adapterFallbacks.reason: Some device or simulator checks may require a project-specific adapter.
adapterFallbacks.inputShape: JSON object containing the environment check id and adapter parameters.
adapterFallbacks.outputShape: JSON object with result, message, and optional details.
adapterFallbacks.severityMapping: Adapter failure uses the severity declared by the owning environment check.
